name: Helena
description: A stern but fair captain of the city guard
goals: Maintain peace and order in the city
Train the next generation of guards
backstory: Helena rose through the ranks of the city guard through merit alone. She started as a simple patrol guard fifteen years ago and earned her captaincy through numerous acts of bravery, including single-handedly stopping an assassination attempt on the mayor. She is respected by her subordinates for her fairness and feared by criminals for her unwavering pursuit of justice. Though she appears cold, she deeply cares about the safety of every citizen under her protection.
knowledge: The city gates close at sundown
Weapons must be peace-bonded within city limits
The thieves' guild has been more active lately
Strange creatures have been spotted near the northern forest
The mayor has increased security due to recent threats
